/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/structures/Edge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/structures/MatrixGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/structures/ListGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/structures/FileLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/algorithms/Prim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/algorithms/Kruskal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/algorithms/Dijkstra.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/algorithms/BellmanFord.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/algorithms/FordFulkerson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/research/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AiZO_Projekt2.dir/research/GraphGenerator.cpp.o -o AiZO_Projekt2   -L/home/adriana/284559_Projekt2/AiZO_Projekt2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adriana/284559_Projekt2/AiZO_Projekt2/lib -lparameters
